LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE MAR-28-2023 HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF LVNV FUNDING'S MOTION FOR ENTERING JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO DEFAULT UNDER SETTLEMENT AND RELEASE AGREEMENT, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. MATTER IS OFF CALENDAR. NO PROOF OF SERVICE AND THE MOTION WAS NOT FILED AND SERVED IN COMPLIANCE WITH CCP 1005. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER JR.; CLERK: SEAN KANE; NOT REPORTED. (302/RBU)

LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE AUG-05-2024 HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF LVNV FUNDING LLC'S MOTION FOR SETTING ASIDE DISMISSAL AND FOR ENTERING JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO DEFAULT UNDER SETTLEMENT, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PLAINTIFF'S UNOPPOSED "MOTION FOR SETTING ASIDE DISMISSAL AND FOR ENTERING JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO DEFENDANT'S DEFAULT UNDER SETTLEMENT AND RELEASE AGREEMENT" IS GRANTED. COUNSEL FOR THE PREVAILING PARTY MUST PREPARE AND SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH STATES THAT THE MOTION WAS NOT OPPOSED. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER JR.; CLERK: S. KANE; NOT REPORTED. (302/RBU)

Motion For Setting Aside Dismissal And For Entering Judgmnt Pursuant To Default Under Settlement
Off Calendar Aug-05-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF LVNV FUNDING LLC's Motion For Setting Aside Dismissal And For Entering Judgment Pursuant To Default Under Settlement.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Plaintiff's unopposed "motion for setting aside dismissal and for entering judgment pursuant to defendant's default under settlement and release agreement" is granted.

Counsel for the prevailing party must prepare and submit a proposed order which states that the motion was not opposed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: S. Kane; Not Reported. (302/RBU)

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Entering Judgment Pursuant To Default Under Settlement And Release Agreement
Off Calendar Mar-28-2023 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF LVNV FUNDING's Motion For Entering Judgment Pursuant To Default Under Settlement And Release Agreement.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Matter is off calendar. No proof of service and the motion was not filed and served in compliance with CCP 1005.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/RBU)
